description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock and handguard, paired with a black metal receiver and barrel assembly. The rifle features a curved detachable box magazine, typical of the AK-47 family, and a prominent front sight post with a rear notch sight. The wood components display a natural grain pattern, contrasting with the matte black finish of the metal parts. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a simple slant-cut muzzle device. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with visible screws, levers, and a trigger guard.
description: A robust assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, handguard, and curved magazine.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock and handguard, with the magazine and trigger visible.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the end of the stock and the slim profile of the rifle.
